content: Create sound.js (WebAudio synth) + mute toggle in PlayShell
Hide ENABLED badge on game cards + detail hero
Aviator: use cut-out plane image in flight scene + takeoff/cashout/crash sounds
Roulette: realistic wheel physics (wheel CCW, ball CW spiral) + classic horizontal table + sounds
Dice: real 3D dice with pips + tumbling roll + sounds
Generic sounds for all games via useLiveRound (chip/win/lose + reveal sounds)
